findings.text: Tenancy agreement template shows £500 advance payment but rent amount and let period are blank.
Accommodation Hardship Fund award of £0 was to be paid by 27 Nov 2025.
On 10 Apr 2026, Kathleen Donnelly requested contact to discuss arrears.
Accommodation Hardship Fund application deadline was 26 Apr 2026.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Chronology of Key Events

- **26 Nov 2025**: Accommodation Hardship Fund award of £0 confirmed, payment by 27 Nov 2025 (NAP-SRC-0022).
- **10 Apr 2026**: Kathleen Donnelly emails Anfal Elbushra requesting contact to discuss arrears (NAP-SRC-0049).
- **15 Apr 2026**: Lee Chalmers emails Anfal, referencing Accommodation Hardship Fund closing 26 Apr 2026 (NAP-SRC-0055).
- **20 Apr 2026**: Anfal updates her hardship fund application (NAP-SRC-0055).
- **21 Apr 2026**: Student Funding requests additional info (SAAS letter, Chemist4U clarification) (NAP-SRC-0055).
- **28 Apr 2026**: Bank statement period ends; no rent payments visible (NAP-SRC-0012).

**Uncertainties**: Rent amount, let period, and arrears total are not specified in available sources.
proposed_artifacts.title: Chronology of Key Dates and Amounts

proposed_tasks.instructions: Request the fully completed tenancy agreement (with rent amount and let period) and the accommodation arrears ledger from the university finance department to determine the exact rent owed and arrears balance.
proposed_tasks.title: Obtain completed tenancy agreement and arrears ledger

risk_flags.text: Blank rent amount and period in tenancy agreement may indicate incomplete contract or missing data.
Arrears amount unknown; may escalate to formal action if unresolved.
Hardship fund deadline passed; alternative funding may be needed.

summary: Extracted key dates and amounts from five sources. Tenancy agreement template shows £500 advance payment but rent amount and period are blank. Bank statement (Sep 2025–Apr 2026) shows low balances and no rent payments. Hardship fund email confirms £0 award paid by 27 Nov 2025. Arrears email chain on 10 Apr 2026 confirms arrears exist but amount unspecified. Urgent support request email chain references Accommodation Hardship Fund closing 26 Apr 2026. Rent amount and arrears total remain uncertain.

uncertainties.text: Total rent amount and let period are not filled in on the tenancy agreement template.
The exact arrears amount is not stated in the email chain.
Bank statement shows no rent payments; it is unclear if rent was paid via another method.
